Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Equalizers of partial setoids

 In this file, we show that the category of partial setoids has equalizers. Since in other
 files we showed that this category has binary products and a terminal object, this allows
 us to conclude that the category of partial setoids has finite limits, which is a key
 ingredient in the tripos-to-topos construction.

 Suppose that we have partial setoids `X` and `Y` and partial setoid morphisms `φ` and `ψ`
 from `X` to `Y`. To construct the equalizer of `φ` and `ψ`, we need to find a suitable
 subtype of `X`. We do so by defining an alternative partial equivalence relation on the
 type `X` (see [equalizer_per]). Intuitively, we identify two elements `x` and `y` if
 they are identified according to the partial equivalence relation of `X` and if there is
 a `y` such that `φ` and `ψ` map `x` to `y`. This is essentially what is written in the
 formula under [equalizer_per_form].

 Content
 1. The equalizer partial setoid
 2. Accessors for the partial equivalence relation of the equalizer
 3. The inclusion of the equalizer
 4. The universal property of the equalizer
 4.1. The map from the universal property
 4.2. Uniqueness of the morphism
 5. Equalizers of partial setoids

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERCategory.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

Section PartialEquivalenceRelationEqualizer.
  Context {H : first_order_hyperdoctrine}
          {X Y : partial_setoid H}
          (φ ψ : partial_setoid_morphism X Y).

  (** * 1. The equalizer partial setoid *)
  Definition equalizer_per_form
    : form (X ×h X)
    := let x := π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
       let x' := π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)) in
       let y := π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) in
       x ~ x'
       ∧
       (∃h (φ [ ⟨ x [ π₁ (tm_var _) ]tm , y ⟩ ]
            ∧
            ψ [ ⟨ x [ π₁ (tm_var _) ]tm , y ⟩ ])).

  Arguments equalizer_per_form /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_axioms equalizer_per_form

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_axioms equalizer_per_form

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_trans_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
per_symm_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
per_symm_axiom
  (x ~ x'
   ∧ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x ~ x'
           ∧ ∃h (φ
                 [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                  y ⟩]
                 ∧ ψ
                   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm, y ⟩]))
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ⇒ (x ~ x'
             ∧ ∃h (φ
                   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm, y ⟩]
                   ∧ ψ
                     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm, y ⟩]))
            [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))]
⊢ ∀h ((x ~ x'
       ∧ ∃h (φ
             [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y
              ⟩]
             ∧ ψ
               [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                y ⟩]))
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ⇒ (x ~ x'
         ∧ ∃h (φ
               [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                y ⟩]
               ∧ ψ
                 [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                  y ⟩]))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ (x ~ x'
   ∧ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ (x ~ x'
     ∧ ∃h (φ
           [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
           ∧ ψ
             [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y
              ⟩]))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ (x ~ x'
   ∧ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (x ~ x'
   ∧ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
         ∧ ψ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x'
 ∧ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
       ∧ ψ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (x ~ x'
   ∧ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩]))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x ~ x')
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ (x ~ x')
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)): tm (X ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((X ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
x'
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]

        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ x
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm ~
  x'
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm, y ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
(π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))),
            π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩ ]tm
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)),
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x ~ x'
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ x' ~ x

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x ~ x' ⊢ x' ~ x

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) X
x ~ x' ⊢ x ~ x'

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ π₂
              (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
            π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])

 ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))))

      ∧ ψ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X))))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ
     [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ
 [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),

  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
⊢ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ x ~ x'
⊢ φ [⟨ x', y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]

(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ x ~ x' ⊢ φ [⟨ x', y ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ x ~ x' ⊢ y ~ y

φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y

                 exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined φ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ x ~ x' ⊢ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H

x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X

X, Y: partial_setoid H

x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X

y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

⊢ ψ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

                 exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined φ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(φ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩]) ∧ x ~ x' ⊢ ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
x':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x, y ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_trans_axiom
  (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
               π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
               ∧ ∃h (φ
                     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                        [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm,
                      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                     ∧ ψ
                       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm,
                        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
                 π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
                 ∧ ∃h (φ
                       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm,
                        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                       ∧ ψ
                         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                            ]tm,
                          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ⟩]))
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
                ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
                   π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
                   ∧ ∃h (φ
                         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                            ]tm,
                          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ⟩]
                         ∧ ψ
                           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                              ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                            ⟩]))
                  [⟨ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
                   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                   ⟩])))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
               π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
               ⟩]
              ∧ ∃h (φ
                    [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                       [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h X)))),
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
                        ⟩
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y)) ]tm,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                            ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
                    ∧ ψ
                      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                         [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                       [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h X)))),
                          π₂
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h X))) ⟩
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y)) ]tm,
                        π₂
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                              ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
              ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
                 π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
                ∧ ∃h (φ
                      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                         [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                       [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                     ×h X))),
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                          ⟩
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y)) ]tm,
                        π₂
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                              ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
                      ∧ ψ
                        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                         [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                       ×h X))),
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                            ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
                ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
                   π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                  [⟨ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))),
                   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                   ⟩]
                  ∧ ∃h (φ
                        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                         [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                                (π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         (((𝟙 ×h X)
                                           ×h X) ×h X)))),
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                            ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
                        ∧ ψ
                          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y))
                           ⟩
                           [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                                  (π₁
                                     (π₁
                                        (tm_var
                                           (((𝟙 ×h X)
                                             ×h X)
                                            ×h X)))),
                              π₂
                                (tm_var
                                   (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h X)) ⟩
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
              ∧ ∃h (φ
                    [⟨ π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                       ×h X) ×h Y))))),
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩]
                    ∧ ψ
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((𝟙 ×h X)
                                          ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h Y))))),
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                             ×h Y)) ⟩])
              ⇒ π₂
                  (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
                π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                ∧ ∃h (φ
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                      ×h X) ×h Y)))),
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                             ×h Y)) ⟩]
                      ∧ ψ
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)
                                        ×h X) ×h Y)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y)) ⟩])
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))
                  ∧ ∃h (φ
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((((...) ×h X)
                                           ×h X) ×h Y))))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y)) ⟩]
                        ∧ ψ
                          [⟨ π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (π₁
                                        (tm_var
                                           ((((...)
                                              ×h X)
                                             ×h X)
                                            ×h Y))))),
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y)) ⟩]))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))
              ∧ ∃h (φ
                    [⟨ π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X)

[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]

x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
(((x₁ ~ x₂)
  [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
 ∧ (x₂ ~ x₃)
   [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
∧ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁

                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),

          [π₁
             (tm_var

          ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm])

  [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁

                      (tm_var
                         ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),

        [⟨ π₂

    [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))]

     [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X

(∃h (φ
     [(⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

            (tm_var

                ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ ψ
       [(⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

            ]tm,
          π₂
            (tm_var

        [⟨ (π₁
              (tm_var

           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)

           (tm_var
              ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
               ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

    [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ]tm]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁

                 (π₁
                    (tm_var ((((...) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

             (π₁

                      (tm_var
                         ((((...) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),

     [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))

  [⟨ π₂

            (tm_var

        ∧ ψ

∃h (φ
    [(⟨ π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),

   [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((...) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))),
       π₂
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
       ⟩])
 ∧ π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h Y))))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))) ~
  π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃)
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₃

tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃)
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ ?y

x₁:= π₂
  (π₁

tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
 exact x₂.

  (π₁
     (π₁

           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃)
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₂ ~ x₃

  (π₁

⊢ x₂ ~ x₃

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
x₂ ~ x₃ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₃

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
(((x₁ ~ x₂)
  [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
   ]tm]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ]tm]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ]tm])
 ∧ (x₂ ~ x₃)
   [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
    ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
      ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
      ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [(⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
        ]tm)
       [⟨ (π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                 ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var
             ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
              ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [(⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [⟨ (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
             [π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
             ]tm,
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
           ⟩ ]tm)
         [⟨ (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            [π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                   ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂
            (tm_var
               ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₃:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) X

  [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
   ]tm]

    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ]tm]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ]tm])
 ∧ (x₂ ~ x₃)
   [(π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
    [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
    ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
      ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))),

        [π₁
           (tm_var

⊢ (φ
   [(⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)))
        [π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

    [⟨ (π₁

       [π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
              ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂
       (tm_var
          ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ ψ
     [(⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))))),

          ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

      [⟨ (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         [π₁
            (tm_var
               ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
                ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

       π₂
         (tm_var
            ((((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y),
      π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
      ⟩ ]tm]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₂

  (π₁

        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

  (π₁

  (π₁

  (π₁

∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃)
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]

tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃)
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃)
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₂

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
((x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]) ∧ x₂ ~ x₃)
∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₃:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per X

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per X

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
form (X ×h X)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_axioms ?e

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
form (X ×h X)
 exact equalizer_per_form.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per_axioms equalizer_per_form
 exact equalizer_per_axioms.
  Defined.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid H

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid H

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
ty H
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per ?X

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
ty H
 exact X.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
per X
 exact equalizer_per.
  Defined.

  (** * 2. Accessors for the partial equivalence relation of the equalizer *)

  (**
     The following definition gives more convenient notation for terms in the equalizer
     of two morphisms.
   *)
  Definition equalizer_partial_setoid_to_type
             {Γ : ty H}
             (t : tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid)
    : tm Γ X
    := t.

  Notation "'ι'" := equalizer_partial_setoid_to_type.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
   ∧ ∃h (φ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ∧ ψ
           [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]
⊢ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]
⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
  ∧ ∃h (φ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ∧ ψ
          [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩] ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩] ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩] ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ∧ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂
q: Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

      exact q.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ~ t₂ ⊢ ι t₁ ~ ι t₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩] ⊢ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩] ⊢ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩] ⊢ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩] ⊢ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ~ t₂ ⊢ X [⟨ ι t₁, ι t₂ ⟩]

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

Γ: ty H

p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
t₁ ~ t₂
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X))
 ∧ ∃h (φ
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
[⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
