H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]
∧ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
(∃h (φ
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])) [⟨ t₁, t₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
t₁, t₂: tm Γ equalizer_partial_setoid
p: Δ ⊢ t₁ ~ t₂
∃h (φ
    [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ t₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  (** * 3. The inclusion of the equalizer *)
  Definition equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
    : form (equalizer_partial_setoid ×h X)
    := let x₁ := π₁ (tm_var _) in
       let x₂ := π₂ (tm_var _) in
       x₁ ~ x₂.

  Arguments equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T'))): tm ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T') T
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T'))): tm ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T') T
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T')): tm ((𝟙 ×h T) ×h T') T'
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
  equalizer_partial_setoid
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
  equalizer_partial_setoid
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((π₁
             (tm_var
                (equalizer_partial_setoid
                 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)) ~
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (equalizer_partial_setoid
                 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)))
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X))) ~
            π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                     ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
  equalizer_partial_setoid
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((π₁
             (tm_var
                (equalizer_partial_setoid
                 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)) ~
           π₂
             (tm_var
                (equalizer_partial_setoid
                 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)))
          [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
  equalizer_partial_setoid
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
          [⟨ x, y ⟩] ⇒ x ~ x))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
               ×h X))))): tm
  ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
     ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)
  equalizer_partial_setoid
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
              ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
            ×h X)))): tm
  ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
     ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)
  equalizer_partial_setoid
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
           ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X))): tm
  ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
     ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X) X
y₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
        ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)): tm
  ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
     ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
                    ⇒ (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (equalizer_partial_setoid
                             ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)) ~
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (equalizer_partial_setoid
                             ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)))
                      [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
                      ⇒ (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (equalizer_partial_setoid
                               ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)) ~
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              (equalizer_partial_setoid
                               ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)))
                        [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]))))

y₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
        ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)): tm
  ((((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
     ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X) X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
                    ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
                       π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                      [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
                      ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
                         π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
                        [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]))))

⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁ ~ x₂
                  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂ ⇒ x₁ ~ y₁ ⇒ x₂ ~ y₂))))

y₁ ~ y₂ ∧ x₁ ~ y₁
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ y₁
         [π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
       ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ y₁
           [π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙
                               ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                              ×h X) ×h X)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((𝟙
                          ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                         ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
              ⇒ equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙
                                 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                                ×h X) ×h X)))),
                 π₂

                      (((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                        ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]

                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙
                             ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                            ×h X) ×h X))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       (((𝟙
                          ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                         ×h X) ×h X)))))

                             ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                            ×h X) ×h X))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       (((𝟙
                          ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                         ×h X) ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
            ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)
  equalizer_partial_setoid
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X)
         ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)
  X
y₂:= π₂
  (tm_var
     (((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid) ×h X) ×h X)
  X
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (equalizer_partial_setoid
                     ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)) ~
               π₂
                 (tm_var
                    (equalizer_partial_setoid
                     ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)))
              [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
              ⇒ (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (equalizer_partial_setoid
                       ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)) ~
                 π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (equalizer_partial_setoid
                       ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)))
                [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂)))

⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~

              ⇒ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid))
      ⇒ ∃h (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
            [⟨ (π₂
                  (tm_var
                     (𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)))
               [π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                      ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂
               (tm_var
                  ((𝟙 ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
                   ×h X)) ⟩]))

T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
T:= equalizer_partial_setoid: partial_setoid H
T':= X: partial_setoid H
x:= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
x ~ x ⊢ x ~ x

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_morphism equalizer_partial_setoid X

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_morphism equalizer_partial_setoid X

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
form (equalizer_partial_setoid ×h X)

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
form (equalizer_partial_setoid ×h X)
 exact equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form.

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form
 exact equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_laws.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism ψ

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism ψ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ φ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ φ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ φ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))
         ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
       [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))
          ⟩])) [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
((π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
       [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))
         ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
         ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
         ⟩])

                 (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)))))
      ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

(π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~

  [⟨ tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
(π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩])
∧ φ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),

  ∧ ψ

  ∧ ψ

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]

y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
 exact x₁.

∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ y₁ ~ y₁

                      exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined φ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]

                      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ ψ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
          [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
            [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
∧ ψ
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))
         ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
       [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))
          ⟩])) [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
((π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))]
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X)),
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm])
∧ φ
  [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
     [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h X))))
       [π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)))
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X))))
         ⟩
         [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
         ]tm])

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
 ∧ ψ
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

X, Y: partial_setoid H

x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

                      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₂
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ y₂ ~ y₂

                      exact (partial_setoid_mor_cod_defined ψ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).
                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]

                      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]

                 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(x₁ ~ x₂ ∧ ψ [⟨ x₂, y₁ ⟩])
∧ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
x₁:= π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
x₂:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₂ ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. The universal property of the equalizer *)
  Context {W : partial_setoid H}
          (χ : partial_setoid_morphism W X)
          (p : partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ
               =
               partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ).

  (** * 4.1. The map from the universal property *)
  Definition morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_form
    : form (W ×h equalizer_partial_setoid)
    := let w := π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)) in
       let x := π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) in
       χ [ ⟨ w , x ⟩ ].

  Arguments morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_form /.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
let s := π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) in
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
let s := π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) in
let y := π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) in
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H

W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
(χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
   ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
χ
[⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
 x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
   ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
χ
[⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
 x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
   ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
χ
[⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
 x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
   ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
χ
[⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
 x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
   ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ) [⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩]
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
∧ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ) [⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ) [⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
⊢ (∃h (χ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ φ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
⊢ ∃h (χ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ φ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
tm (Γ ×h Y) X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (Γ ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
tm (Γ ×h Y) X
 exact (x [ s ]tm).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (Γ ×h Y), x [s ]tm ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ φ
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var (Γ ×h Y), x [s ]tm ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩]
  ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
∧ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ) [⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ
∧ (∃h (χ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
∃h (χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]) ∧ Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
(∃h (χ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ ψ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]) ∧ Δ)
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
((∃h (χ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]))
 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
 ∧ Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))])
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
(∃h (χ
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ∧ ψ
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
  ∧ χ
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (∃h (φ
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ∃h ((φ
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
       ∧ ψ
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x

y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y

tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
 exact (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var _))).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [s ]tm, y ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))
        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Γ
y:= π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)): tm (Γ ×h Y) Y
Δ:= χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]: form (Γ ×h Y)
(χ
 [⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
  x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ w [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ((φ
    [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
    ∧ ψ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

 ∧ φ

        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ]tm,

⊢ ((φ

  [⟨ tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X),

w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
(χ
 [⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
  x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,

∧ χ
  [⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,

    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),

⊢ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

 [⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,

  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
χ
[⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
 x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm ⟩]
∧ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
φ
[⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
(χ
 [⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
  x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩])
∧ χ
  [⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

 [⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,

  ∧ ψ
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ
 [⟨ w [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
  x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm ⟩]
 ∧ φ
   [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,

∧ χ

  ∧ ψ

     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ ψ
  [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ]tm,
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))) ⟩]

          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x' ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]
⊢ ψ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]

y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X

W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x' ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]
⊢ ?x₁ ~ x [s ]tm
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x' ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩] ⊢ ?y₁ ~ y
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x' ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]
⊢ ψ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x

x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X

 exact x'.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩]
⊢ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩]

                 apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x' ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x' ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
(χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x [s ]tm ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ x [s ]tm, y ⟩])
∧ χ [⟨ w [s ]tm, x' ⟩] ∧ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
Γ: ty H
w: tm Γ W
x: tm Γ X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ x ~ x
s:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Γ
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X))): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) Y
x':= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X)): tm ((Γ ×h Y) ×h X) X
ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩] ⊢ ψ [⟨ x', y ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
partial_setoid_morphism_laws
  morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_form

X, Y: partial_setoid H

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((χ
           [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
            π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
⊢ (χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
∧ (χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))

 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))

χ

w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W

 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ w ~ w

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((χ
           [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
            π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ~
            π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))))

W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
