(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
⊢ (χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ~

χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ ι x ~ ι x
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ ι x ~ ι x

χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
 apply morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_laws_eq.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X)
                                 ×h X))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X)
                              ×h X))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X)
                             ×h X))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))
                    ⇒ (χ
                       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
                        π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((𝟙 ×h W)
                                          ×h W) ×h X)
                                        ×h X))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X)
                                ×h X))) ⟩]
                      ⇒ (χ
                         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
                          π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W)
                                        ×h X) ×h X)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X)
                               ×h X)) ⟩]))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))])
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ π₂
    (π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))))
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))
    ⇒ (χ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))))),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))
       ⟩]
      ⇒ (χ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]

x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X

tm ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X

χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) W

  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) W

(w₁ ~ w₂ ∧ x₁ ~ x₂) ∧ χ [⟨ w₁, x₁ ⟩] ⊢ ?x₁ ~ w₂

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law
  morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((χ
               [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
                π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (χ
                 [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
                  π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
                 π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
((⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))]
⊢ (χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
  ⇒ (χ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))

 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ (χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),

χ

  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) W
χ
[⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))),
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x₁
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩] ∧ χ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x₁
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X))): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)): tm (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x₁
           [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        apply morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_laws_eq.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_form
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))
      ⇒ ∃h ((χ
             [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
              π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]))

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))
  ⇒ ∃h ((χ
         [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
          ⟩])
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩])

χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))
⊢ ∃h ((χ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩])

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W))
⊢ ∃h ((χ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h ((χ
        [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
         ⟩])
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]

(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (χ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))

         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm])

χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ (χ
   [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm])
  [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))]
∧ χ
  [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
     [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ χ
  [(⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h W)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩
     [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))) ~
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)))
∧ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)) ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
w ~ w ∧ χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h W) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
∃h ((χ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]) ⊢ χ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
χ
⊢ ∃h ((χ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
∃h ((χ
     [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
    ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
      [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]) ⊢ χ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(∃h ((χ
      [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
     [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
     ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
       [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ (χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
(χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
⊢ χ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

χ
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
 [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))

   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ ?x₁ ~ w
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ ?y₁ ~ x₁
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ χ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
 exact w.

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ

tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
 exact x₂.

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X

        exact (partial_setoid_mor_dom_defined χ _ _ (hyperdoctrine_hyp _)).

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ χ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
χ
⊢ ∃h ((χ
       [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
tm (W ×h X) X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
χ
⊢ ((χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
tm (W ×h X) X
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
χ
⊢ ((χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
χ
⊢ χ
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
χ
⊢ χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))

χ

  ∧ π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ ⊢ ι x ~ ι (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ ⊢ ι x ~ ι (π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)))
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ ⊢ χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ [tm_var (W ×h X)]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

             
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ∧ ψ
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])

             apply morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_laws_eq.
  Qed.

  Context {ζ : partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid}
          (q : partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism
               =
               χ).

  (** * 4.2. Uniqueness of the morphism *)
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ = morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ
⊢ (∃h (ζ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ
⊢ ∃h (ζ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
          ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
            π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ
⊢ ∃h (ζ
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
          ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
            π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
        (π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
        [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
         π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)),
            π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm)

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H

  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
tm (W ×h X) X
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ
⊢ (ζ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
     (π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm)
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), ?t ⟩]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
tm (W ×h X) X
 exact (π₂ (tm_var _)).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ
⊢ (ζ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
     (π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm)
  [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ
⊢ ζ
  [(⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ ((π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
     (π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))
         ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm)
    [⟨ tm_var (W ×h X), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩]

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H

p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =

ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
ζ
⊢ ζ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X))

w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩] ⊢ ζ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ ζ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
r:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b q
  (hyperdoctrine_hyp (χ [⟨ w, x ⟩])): χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ (partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
     equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism) [⟨ w, x ⟩]
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ ζ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
r:= from_eq_partial_setoid_morphism_b q
  (hyperdoctrine_hyp (χ [⟨ w, x ⟩])): χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (ζ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
          π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]))
  [⟨ w, x ⟩]
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ ζ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((ζ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
          π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])
χ [⟨ w, x ⟩] ⊢ ζ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) W
x:= π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)): tm (W ×h X) X
r: χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((ζ
       [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
        π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
       ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~
          π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
         [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
          π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩])
(χ [⟨ w, x ⟩]) [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ (ζ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ w, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
(χ [⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩])
[π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]
∧ (ζ
   [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
   ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
     [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
      π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩])
  [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
χ
[⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
 [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm]
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ∧ (π₁ (tm_var (X ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (X ×h X)))
    [⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (W ×h X)), π₂ (tm_var (W ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
χ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      (* simplify. *)

φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
χ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]
∧ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ∧ π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩]
∧ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]
  ∧ x₂ ~ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)))
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩] ∧ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ ζ [π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))]

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
χ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩] ∧ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁
⊢ ζ
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))) ⟩]

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X

⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x₁ ⟩]

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y

q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ

w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ ?x₁ ~ w
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H

x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ ?y₁ ~ x₁
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ ζ [⟨ ?x₁, ?y₁ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X

ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
 exact w.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) equalizer_partial_setoid
 exact x₂.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ w ~ w
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ w ~ w

        
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₁
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ x₂ ~ x₁

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ∧ x₂ ~ x₁ ⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ, ψ: partial_setoid_morphism X Y
W: partial_setoid H
χ: partial_setoid_morphism W X
p: partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ φ =
partial_setoid_comp_morphism χ ψ
ζ: partial_setoid_morphism W equalizer_partial_setoid
q: partial_setoid_comp_morphism ζ
  equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism = χ
w:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) W
x₁:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X))): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
x₂:= π₂ (tm_var ((W ×h X) ×h X)): tm ((W ×h X) ×h X) X
ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩] ⊢ ζ [⟨ w, x₂ ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.
End PartialEquivalenceRelationEqualizer.

Arguments equalizer_per_form {H X Y} φ ψ /.
Arguments equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_form {H X Y} φ ψ /.
Arguments morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_form {H X Y φ ψ W} χ.

(** * 5. Equalizers of partial setoids *)

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Equalizers (category_of_partial_setoids H)


H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
Equalizers (category_of_partial_setoids H)

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Equalizer φ ψ

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
category_of_partial_setoids H
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ ?x, X ⟧
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
?e · φ = ?e · ψ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
isEqualizer φ ψ ?e ?H

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
category_of_partial_setoids H
 exact (equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
category_of_partial_setoids H
⟦ equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ, X ⟧
 exact (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ · φ =
equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ · ψ
 exact (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_eq φ ψ).
  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
isEqualizer φ ψ
  (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ)
  (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism_eq φ ψ)
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
∃! φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
        equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧,
φ0 · equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ = χ

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
∑
φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
     equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧,
φ0 · equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ = χ
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
∏
t : ∑
    φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
         equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧,
    φ0 · equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ = χ,
t = ?x

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
∑
φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
     equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧,
φ0 · equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ = χ
 
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
partial_setoid_morphism W
  (equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ)
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism ?Goal0
  (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ) = χ

      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
partial_setoid_morphism W
  (equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ)
 exact (morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ χ p).
      
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
partial_setoid_comp_morphism
  (morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ χ p)
  (equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ) = χ
 exact (morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_eq φ ψ χ p).
    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: category_of_partial_setoids H
φ, ψ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ X, Y ⟧
W: category_of_partial_setoids H
χ: category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W, X ⟧
p: χ · φ = χ · ψ
∏
t : ∑
    φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
         equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧,
    φ0 · equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ = χ,
t =
(morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ χ p
 :
 category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
 equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧),,
(morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_eq φ ψ χ p
 :
 (λ φ0 : category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
         equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧,
  φ0 · equalizer_partial_setoid_morphism φ ψ = χ)
   (morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ χ p
    :
    category_of_partial_setoids H ⟦ W,
    equalizer_partial_setoid φ ψ ⟧))
 abstract
        (intros ζ ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply homset_property | ] ; cbn ;
           apply morphism_to_equalizer_partial_setoid_unique ;
         exact (pr2 ζ)).
Defined.
